items.label: Plannotator
items.description: Review and annotate plans before implementation, so agents get clearer feedback loops instead of vague handoff notes.

items.label: RTK
items.description: Compress noisy command output for coding agents and add agent hooks or rules that nudge shell commands through RTK.

items.label: Yggtree
items.description: Create and manage git worktrees with a focused CLI workflow for agent-friendly branch and workspace handling.

items.label: Impeccable
items.description: Install Impeccable's frontend design skills globally through its official installer.
